global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with promotional text and product images.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend sale with significant discounts.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A vibrant red background fills the entire banner, creating a bold and eye-catching base.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: The logo 'VantaStyle' is displayed prominently at the top in a stylish font, likely in white or contrasting color.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular shapes resembling product images are centered, with a glossy finish and slight reflections.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Another rectangular shape resembling a product image, positioned next to the first, maintaining the same glossy appearance.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A third rectangular shape resembling a product image, completing the trio with a similar glossy finish.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is located below the product images, possibly indicating a feature or selection.

elements.label: Discount message
elements.description: The text 'Up to 40% off Only this weekend' is prominently displayed in a bold font, conveying urgency and excitement.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Only this weekend

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is positioned at the top right in a bright color, drawing attention to the promotional event.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The word 'SALE' appears in a bold, eye-catching font, likely in a contrasting color to the background.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product images in the center, with the discount message below and the CTA at the bottom.
